Renovate auto-merge 停止

FROZEN

feature deploy 全凍結
hotfix のみ SRE+Security 二重承認
Argo Sync auto 停止

div.div: 点線: 28日 rolling window で budget 回復 (自動)

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 1058px; height: 1px; padding-top: 305px; margin-left: 61px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 13px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div: Budget 計算式 (28 日 rolling window)

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 1043px; height: 1px; padding-top: 342px; margin-left: 77px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
Budget(t) = (1 - SLO_target) * 総リクエスト数(t-28d, t)
Consumed(t) = エラーリクエスト数(t-28d, t)
Remaining(t) = 1 - Consumed(t) / Budget(t)
例: SLO=99.9%, 7日間で総 100M req → 28日 budget 400K, 消費 200K → Remaining=50% (WARNING 境界)

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 1058px; height: 1px; padding-top: 460px; margin-left: 61px;

display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: nowrap;

div.div: HEALTHY: 平常運転、何の制約も発火しない

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 242, 204), rgb(40, 29, 0)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(215, 155, 0), rgb(153, 101, 0));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 617px; margin-left: 87px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: nowrap;

div.div: WARNING: 観測強化 + Canary 慎重化、開発は自由

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 230, 204), rgb(54, 33, 10)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(215, 155, 0), rgb(153, 101, 0));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 640px; margin-left: 87px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: nowrap;

div.div: ALERT: PagerDuty で人間関与、auto-merge 停止 (人手 review 強制)

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(248, 206, 204), rgb(81, 45, 43)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(184, 84, 80), rgb(215, 129, 126));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 663px; margin-left: 87px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: nowrap;

div.div: FROZEN: feature deploy 全停止、hotfix のみ SRE+Security 二重承認で通過

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 594px; margin-left: 602px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 9px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: nowrap;

div.div: ① 28 日 rolling window を採用。週次 / 月次の固定窓は「窓のリセット日に集中して deploy する」aliasing を生むため不採用。

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 614px; margin-left: 602px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 9px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: nowrap;

div.div: ② FROZEN は ADR-OBS-001 + ADR-REL-001 の境界に位置する。観測 (本章) が判定し、リリース (70 章) が実行する責務分離。

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 634px; margin-left: 602px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 9px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: nowrap;

div.div: ③ 状態遷移は Mimir の recording rule で 5 分粒度で評価。瞬間的な spike で WARNING 化することを避けるため 15 分平均で評価。

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 654px; margin-left: 602px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 9px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: nowrap;

div.div: ④ Budget 回復は自動 (deploy 抑制で error 減 → window から消費が外れる)。手動リセットは禁止 (リセット文化が広がると意味喪失)。
